title: Invoice
description: SHELL for PR 2. Fields only — no payment-clock / prompt-payment-interest logic here (that is PR 2, and its HolidayCalendarProvider must be source-backed and fail closed). No tier-3 data (no TIN/SSN/DOB). No numeric confidence/risk scores.

received_date.description: Shell field; the payment clock that consumes it is PR 2.

net_terms_days.description: Operational term length in days (a count, not a score). Clock math is PR 2.

preflight_verdict.description: Categorical RM-5 pre-flight verdict string (set by the existing validator), if run.
